'''âw-v-sh''' ('''kawavash''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:jerque|jerque]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| w-v-sh
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:jerque|jerque]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âw-v-sh
|-
! Lemma
| kawavash
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thiwavash|thiwavash]] || [[word:jiwavash|jiwavash]] || [[word:shiwavash|shiwavash]] || [[word:kiwavash|kiwavash]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuwavash|thuthuwavash]] || [[word:jujuwavash|jujuwavash]] || [[word:shushuwavash|shushuwavash]] || [[word:kukuwavash|kukuwavash]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuwavash|thuwavash]] || [[word:juwavash|juwavash]] || [[word:shuwavash|shuwavash]] || [[word:kuwavash|kuwavash]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuwavash|thuwavash]] || [[word:juwavash|juwavash]] || [[word:shuwavash|shuwavash]] || [[word:kuwavash|kuwavash]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thewavash|thewavash]] || [[word:jewavash|jewavash]] || [[word:shewavash|shewavash]] || [[word:kewavash|kewavash]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothowavash|thothowavash]] || [[word:jojowavash|jojowavash]] || [[word:shoshowavash|shoshowavash]] || [[word:kokowavash|kokowavash]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thowavash|thowavash]] || [[word:jowavash|jowavash]] || [[word:showavash|showavash]] || [[word:kowavash|kowavash]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thowavash|thowavash]] || [[word:jowavash|jowavash]] || [[word:showavash|showavash]] || [[word:kowavash|kowavash]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠwavash|thĂŠwavash]] || [[word:jĂŠwavash|jĂŠwavash]] || [[word:shĂŠwavash|shĂŠwavash]] || [[word:kĂŠwavash|kĂŠwavash]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathawavash|thathawavash]] || [[word:jajawavash|jajawavash]] || [[word:shashawavash|shashawavash]] || [[word:kakawavash|kakawavash]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thawavash|thawavash]] || [[word:jawavash|jawavash]] || [[word:shawavash|shawavash]] || [[word:kawavash|kawavash]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thawavash|thawavash]] || [[word:jawavash|jawavash]] || [[word:shawavash|shawavash]] || [[word:kawavash|kawavash]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shawavash|shawavash]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshawavash|goshawavash]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishawavash|gokishawavash]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shawavashnĂŒ|shawavashnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshawavashnknĂŒ|goshawavashnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishawavashnĂŒ|gokishawavashnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shawavashĂ«|shawavashĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshawavashnkshĂ«|goshawavashnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishawavashĂ«|gokishawavashĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shawavashro|shawavashro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshawavashnkro|goshawavashnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishawavashro|gokishawavashro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shawavashmu|shawavashmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshawavashnkmu|goshawavashnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishawavashmu|gokishawavashmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shawavasher|shawavasher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshawavashnksher|goshawavashnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishawavasher|gokishawavasher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shawavashng|shawavashng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshawavashnkng|goshawavashnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishawavashng|gokishawavashng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shawavashya|shawavashya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshawavashnkya|goshawavashnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishawavashya|gokishawavashya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shawavashyam|shawavashyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshawavashnkyam|goshawavashnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishawavashyam|gokishawavashyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shawavashnĂŒshĂ«|shawavashnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshawavashnknĂŒshĂ«|goshawavashnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishawavashnĂŒshĂ«|gokishawavashnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shawavashnĂŒro|shawavashnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshawavashnknĂŒro|goshawavashnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishawavashnĂŒro|gokishawavashnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shawavashnĂŒmu|shawavashnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshawavashnknĂŒmu|goshawavashnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishawavashnĂŒmu|gokishawavashnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shawavashĂ«nĂŒ|shawavashĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshawavashnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshawavashnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishawavashĂ«nĂŒ|gokishawavashĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shawavashĂ«ro|shawavashĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshawavashnkshĂ«ro|goshawavashnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishawavashĂ«ro|gokishawavashĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shawavashĂ«mu|shawavashĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshawavashnkshĂ«mu|goshawavashnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishawavashĂ«mu|gokishawavashĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shawavashronĂŒ|shawavashronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshawavashnkronĂŒ|goshawavashnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishawavashronĂŒ|gokishawavashronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shawavashroshĂ«|shawavashroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshawavashnkroshĂ«|goshawavashnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishawavashroshĂ«|gokishawavashroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shawavashromu|shawavashromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshawavashnkromu|goshawavashnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishawavashromu|gokishawavashromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shawavashmunĂŒ|shawavashmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshawavashnkmunĂŒ|goshawavashnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishawavashmunĂŒ|gokishawavashmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shawavashmushĂ«|shawavashmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshawavashnkmushĂ«|goshawavashnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishawavashmushĂ«|gokishawavashmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shawavashmuro|shawavashmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshawavashnkmuro|goshawavashnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishawavashmuro|gokishawavashmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

{{wordpage|d0c3b9f}}
